case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. MARCO CASTRO ET AL

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-16-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-16-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $302.95 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 63481493) AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, MARCO
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 63481493) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTRO, MARCO $7,303.32 PRINCIPAL, $302.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,606.27, SEE SCANNED DOC
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, MARCO
